title: Contact Wera Hobhouse MP – For Bath Constituents
meta_description: Constituents are welcome to contact Wera Hobhouse MP with requests, concerns, or feedback. Subscribe to her newsletter.
headings: h3: Constituents are welcome to contact me and my team with their comments, requests and issues.
h3: Thank you for taking the time to write. We can only respond to constituents, so please be sure to include your full name and address, including your postcode.

Get in touch Thank you for taking the time to write. We can only respond to constituents, so please be sure to include your full name and address, including your postcode. Wera Hobhouse MP © House of Commons First Name* Last Name* Your email* Address* Post Code* Subject Your message* I confirm I am a Bath constituent * * denotes required field. Subscribe to my Newsletter Wera Hobhouse has been the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Bath since 2017. Wera introduced the Upskirting and Workers Protection Bills. Both have now passed into law. Since 2024 she has been on the Energy Security and Net Zero Select Committee, Chair of the Eating Disorders All Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) and Vice Chair of the Europe APPG.
